$comment: version-bound to this package.json version. A real deepseek-v4-pro agent installed the
package through pi install git: into a clean HOME and used kb_add to write to the brain;
the upgrade arm observed the capability ABSENT on the pre-capability baseline and PRESENT
after remove+reinstall; the can-fail contrast arm (AGENTS.md cold floor, package absent)
The gate DERIVES this status by recomputing the verdict from per-trial observations —
it never reads a verdict field. Editing this by hand goes red.
SCOPE, stated: the upgrade arm proves REMOVE+REINSTALL delivers the new capability. It
does NOT claim pi update would — pi does not re-resolve a ref (vfkb gotcha 7bbdf89f39f7).
